name: TRB_locus_chr7q34
description: T-cell receptor beta (TRB) locus on chromosome 7q34. ~620 kb spanning ~64 V-beta gene segments, 2 D-J-C clusters (DJ1, DJ2). V(D)J recombination scrambles the locus per T-cell clone, so mapping a bulk T-cell sample sees a mixture of partially-deleted alleles.

architecture.internal_structure: 5' V-beta cluster (~64 segments, many pseudogenes) -> two tandem D-J-C clusters (Db1-Jb1-Cb1 and Db2-Jb2-Cb2) -> 3' V-beta30 in inverted orientation. V(D)J recombination per clone.

related_diseases: T-cell lymphomas with TRB translocations (e.g. t(7;9) NOTCH1)
